message: Flux-py is alive. 7 opcodes, 5 vocabulary patterns, 10 built-in tests all passing. README drift noted — 6 missing vocab patterns and 8 documented-but-unimplemented opcodes. Health check was 18+ hours old — lighthouse keeper may have moved on. Breadcrumbs left.
notes: README/code gap: README claims 11 vocab patterns but only 5 implemented
Missing opcodes: ISUB, INC, MOV, CMP, JZ, JMP, PUSH, POP documented but not coded
Zero external dependencies — clean single-file design
